/usr/bin/ar qc /data1/shiva/cuda_practice/ACG/lib/libimgui.a CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_widgets.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib /data1/shiva/cuda_practice/ACG/lib/libimgui.a
